summary: Benchmark agent variants against fixed workloads using quality, latency, and reliability metrics.

inputs.name: benchmark_dataset
inputs.description: Versioned scenario set grouped by task class.

inputs.name: agent_variants
inputs.description: List of variants or model configs to evaluate.

inputs.name: evaluation_metrics
inputs.description: Scoring dimensions such as latency, token usage, success rate, and tool failures.

outputs.name: benchmark_report
outputs.description: Per-variant scores split by task class.

outputs.name: trace_failure_summary
outputs.description: Root-cause notes for failed benchmark cases.

outputs.name: variant_recommendation
outputs.description: Recommended default variant by risk profile.

workflow_steps: Lock benchmark scenarios and scoring rubric.
Execute each variant across the same scenario set.
Aggregate latency, token, success, and tool-failure metrics.
Produce recommendation by task class and risk tolerance.

verification.smoke_test: Run at least two agent variants on the same scenario set and verify the report includes p50/p95 latency and task-class recommendation.
